center.name: 默拉皮火山
center.summary: 默拉皮火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括短尾绿鹊，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Javan green magpie is restricted to a small range in western Java, where it has been recorded in Mount Merapi National Park, Mount Halimun Salak National Park, Mount Gede Pangrango National Park and South Parahyangan Practice Forest and Nature Reserve. These areas are located predominantly in montane forests and foothills at elevations between
